text:
In this subchapter:

(1) “Highway asset” means an interest in real property that is held or controlled by the department for a highway or department purpose.

(2) “Rest area” means an area of public land designated by the department as a rest area, comfort station, picnic area, or roadside park.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 202. Control of Transp. Assets
##### § 202.051 — Definitions

In this subchapter:

    (1) “Highway asset” means an interest in real property that is held or controlled by the department for a highway or department purpose.

    (2) “Rest area” means an area of public land designated by the department as a rest area, comfort station, picnic area, or roadside park.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.text: “Highway asset” means an interest in real property that is held or controlled by the department for a highway or department purpose.
“Rest area” means an area of public land designated by the department as a rest area, comfort station, picnic area, or roadside park.
